name: GET /api/properties/:slug - Public property detail by slug
description: Public detail endpoint that powers /properties/<slug> on web-public. 404s for unpublished slugs (status != 'published') so direct lookups can't leak DRAFT / HOLD / SOLD rows.
skipReason: property-service runs on port 4012 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

testCases.name: Fetch a published property by slug
